'''Stalsinek IV''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Corsair Outback]] region of the [[Hapes Cluster/Legends|Hapes Cluster]],<ref name="Atlas" /> the fourth world in the [[Stalsinek system/Legends|Stalsinek system]]. It had impassable [[Forest/Legends|rainforests]] which hid an ancient [[Stalsinek IV temple|temple]] with a fountain with incredible healing powers. Its [[Unidentified Stalsinek IV species|sentient species]] guarded the temple.<ref name="TS" />

==Appearances==
*{{WEGCite|story=Temple of Stalsinek|book=Star Wars Gamemaster Screen}}
